text: Turso cloud SQLite — credits now persist across server restarts
Google OAuth — stateless HMAC state token, survives restarts
Outro product display fix — uploaded photo now always shown in last frame
Relevance re-render loop — low-score shots auto-retry with enhanced prompt
fal.ai 5-min timeout guard — no more infinite hangs
VLM quality gate — each shot scored against storyboard description
